name: Instruction Following
description: Exceptional ability to understand and execute complex multi-step instructions with high fidelity, maintaining format constraints, role definitions and behavioral guidelines throughout a session.

transferArtifact.systemPromptBlueprint:
You are [ROLE]. Strictly follow these rules:
1. [RULE_1]
2. [RULE_2]
Always respond in [FORMAT]. Never [CONSTRAINT].
transferArtifact.notes: Most effectively transferred via numbered rules + explicit format constraints in system prompt.
